skipped_items.title: React as a UI Runtime
skipped_items.reason_ja: 非AIコンテンツ。Dan AbramovによるReactプログラミングモデルの技術的解説。ホストツリー、レンダラー、変異モード vs 永続モードなどのReact内部アーキテクチャの話で、AI/LLMとの関連性なし。
skipped_items.body_excerpt: Most tutorials introduce React as a UI library. This makes sense because React is a UI library. That's literally what the tagline says! This post talks about React in a different way -- more as a programming runtime...

skipped_items.body_excerpt: Remember files? .doc .doc .doc .doc .jpg .jpg .svg. You write a document, hit save, and the file is on your computer. It's yours. Files come from the paradigm of personal computing...

skipped_items.title: Why 2026 is The Year of Agentic Search -- Doug Turnbull & Jo Kristian Bergum
skipped_items.reason_ja: 既存wikiで完全にカバー済み。entities/doug-turnbull-speaking.md の Conference Talks セクションに「Why 2026 is The Year of Agentic Search」の詳細サマリー（4つの柱：LLM Query Understanding、Autoresearch、Agentic Search Harnesses、LLM-as-a-Judge）が既に収録されている。concepts/agentic-search.md も豊富なコンテンツでカバー済み。
skipped_items.body_excerpt: A 65-minute fireside chat between Doug Turnbull (search relevance expert) and Jo Kristian Bergum (Vespa.ai) arguing that the search problems of 2026 are fundamentally agentic search problems...
